title: Issue 2044 representative command migration
lane_outcome: Migrate one representative ordinary command path from runtime-owned semantics to the new contract/IR projection path without broadening the migration beyond the proven slice.
purpose_for_parent: Demonstrates the architecture path end to end before wider rollout.
technical_strategy: Tighten the lane strategy before the first slice starts.
acceptance_boundary: All lane slices have landed, lane proof aggregation is satisfied, and residual work is routed.
proof_strategy: Use black-box behavior parity plus generated-output freshness and boundary checks for the selected command.
